description: Amira discusses crypto policy with Matt Homer, a former executive deputy superintendent of the New York Department of Financial Services. They explore the differences between federal and state regulation of cryptocurrency, the historical context of banking laws, and the current state of crypto regulations in the U.S. [t=6:24] [t=9:04] [t=34:89] [t=140:95]
topic_summary: The conversation covers the evolution of crypto regulation in the U.S., focusing on the dual banking system, the role of state versus federal regulators, and the challenges faced by companies like Coinbase in navigating these regulations. [t=47:21] [t=188:29] [t=275:24]
router_tags: New York Department of Financial Services
